title: Fast Player Minecarts
description: Make minecarts that are ridden by players faster!
body:
# Fast Player Minecarts

A simple paper plugin I made for having faster minecarts without breaking minecart based redstone machines. It works with and without the new experimental minecart physics.

## Config

`defaultSpeed` is the speed of a 'regular' minecart
`fastSpeed` is the speed of a minecart being ridden by a player

### Default
```yaml
defaultSpeed: 8
fastSpeed: 20
```
